goal: Close the next concrete gap in the real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker by adding a CUDA training host prerequisite preflight before the long real adapter training command. The preflight must fail fast when fake backend mode, CUDA, LLaMA-Factory, strict model cache files, Docker daemon/base image digest, or generated backend config prerequisites are missing; integrate into the existing CUDA training handoff before training; and keep current local release state NOT_GO.
head: 670279a
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a standalone CUDA training preflight script, integrate it into the existing CUDA training handoff before the training command, add focused script tests, regenerate review artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: CUDA training preflight reports NOT_READY on the current non-CUDA host without claiming release GO

Preflight checks fake backend env, nvidia-smi, llamafactory-cli, dataset file, backend_config.yaml, strict model cache required file hashes, Docker daemon, digest-pinned base image env, and Docker base image availability
CUDA training handoff invokes the preflight before llamafactory-cli train
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until this preflight passes on a real CUDA host and the downstream training/Docker/endpoint evidence is collected.
This gate prepares preflight tooling only and does not build or commit model weights, adapters, or Docker images.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped CUDA training host preflight gate after confirming the next final-program blocker still requires external real CUDA adapter training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed current final-program completion is still blocked only by real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint and that the external CUDA training handoff previously lacked a single structured preflight before the long training command.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/check_cuda_lora_training_prereqs.py, integrated preflight_cuda_training into scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py before llamafactory-cli train, and added focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated the preflight and CUDA training handoff artifacts, confirmed current host preflight is NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING without release GO, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a preflight-tooling gate. It fails fast on missing CUDA/Docker/model-cache prerequisites before real adapter training and does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA training host preflight script, CUDA training handoff integration, focused tests, review evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
